name: Alpredo FX
bio: Hey, I'm Alpredo, a digital artist from Indonesia specializing in cinematic Minecraft artwork. I create character-focused visuals with dramatic lighting, clean compositions, and high-quality post-processing. Whether it's a YouTube thumbnail, wallpaper, poster, or custom artwork, my goal is to bring every Minecraft character to life with a unique cinematic style.

name: Aemiro
bio: Aemiro adalah storyteller yang menghadirkan petualangan melalui karya-karyanya.

name: Steven
bio: Steven adalah architectural artist yang fokus pada desain bangunan dan struktur megah.
